content: Hey, I'm feeling a bit stressed about my part-time MBA program. I've been working on it for about a year now, and I'm trying to balance it with my podcast hosting job.
I can imagine how challenging it must be to balance work and school. What inspired you to pursue an MBA?

I've always been interested in business and entrepreneurship, and I wanted to gain more knowledge and skills to help me grow my podcast, which focuses on true crime stories. I've been enjoying the program so far, but it's been tough to balance with my work schedule in Salt Lake City, UT.
That's a great goal! Podcasting can be a lot of fun, and true crime stories are always fascinating. Have you had any particularly interesting guests or episodes recently?

Actually, I had a great guest on my last episode, a detective who shared some amazing insights into a recent case. It was really informative and engaging. I've also been enjoying hiking and tennis in my free time to stay active.
That sounds like a great episode! I'm sure your listeners appreciated the expertise and storytelling. Do you have any upcoming episodes or projects that you're excited about?

Yes, I'm actually working on a new series about cold cases, and I'm really excited to dive into the research and interviews. I've been practicing my calligraphy skills to create some unique graphics for the series.
That sounds like a fascinating project! Cold cases can be really intriguing, and I'm sure your listeners will be hooked. Have you always been interested in true crime stories?

Yes, I've been fascinated by them for years. I think it's because I'm interested in psychology and human behavior, and true crime stories often involve complex motivations and circumstances. I've been reading a lot about it and even attended a conference on the topic last year.
That's really interesting. It's great that you're pursuing your passions and interests. How do you balance your work and personal life, especially with the demands of podcasting and school?

It can be tough, but I try to prioritize my tasks and focus on the most important things. I've been working on my time management skills and trying to take breaks when I need them. I'm planning to take a break and go on a hike with my friends on August 15th.

That's a great approach! Taking care of yourself is essential, especially when you're pursuing multiple goals and projects. I'm sure your listeners appreciate the effort you put into creating engaging and informative content.
